UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the Playmakers app, storing personal details, friend connections, and general account information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: The user's chosen unique username for display within the app.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication and account recovery.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture, if set.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user for their profile.

friendIds.description: References to other UserProfile entities that this user has added as friends.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Sport.title: Sport
Sport.description: Represents a distinct professional sport available in the Playmakers app (e.g., Basketball, Football, Golf, NASCAR).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sport entity.

name.description: The common name of the sport (e.g., 'Basketball').

description.description: A brief description of the sport.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing the sport.

League.title: League
League.description: Represents a professional league within a specific sport (e.g., NBA, NFL, PGA Tour).

id.description: Unique identifier for the League entity.

name.description: The full name of the league (e.g., 'National Basketball Association').

description.description: A brief description of the league.

sportId.description: Reference to the Sport entity this league belongs to.

logoUrl.description: URL to the official logo of the league.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a professional sports team participating in events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

name.description: The full name of the team.

sportId.description: Reference to the Sport entity this team belongs to.

leagueId.description: Reference to the League entity this team primarily plays in.

city.description: The city or region the team represents.

logoUrl.description: URL to the official logo of the team.

Athlete.title: Athlete
Athlete.description: Represents a professional athlete from various sports, whose performance can be picked in games.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Athlete entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the athlete.

lastName.description: The last name of the athlete.

sportId.description: Reference to the Sport entity the athlete competes in.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team entity the athlete is currently on, if applicable.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the athlete's profile picture.

Game.title: Game
Game.description: Represents a friend-to-friend sweepstakes or pick-em game created by a user for a specific sports event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Game entity.

description.description: A description outlining the rules or theme of the game.

creatorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity of the user who created this game.

sportId.description: The sport this game is based on.

currencyType.description: The currency used for entry: 'gold' or 'sweeps'.

entryFee.description: The number of coins required to enter.

prizePool.description: The total potential coins awarded to winners.

inviteCode.description: A unique code that friends can use to join.

winnerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the winner.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the game was created.

UserWallet.title: UserWallet
UserWallet.description: Manages the in-app currency balances (Gold Coins and Sweepstakes Coins) for each user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserWallet entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this wallet belongs to.

goldCoins.description: The current balance of Gold Coins.

sweepstakesCoins.description: The current balance of Sweepstakes Coins.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating when the wallet balances were last updated.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

definition.description: Manages in-app currency balances for each user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user.

params.name: gameId
params.description: The unique ID of the game.
